task: adjust specification with the need for a global option on how to deal with annex'ed content when is needed, e.g. `--annexed=error,get,skip-warning,skip`, so by default we would just error (but nicely and informatively), and then I could use  `bids-utils --annexed get session-rename ses-20230705 ses-202307XX` . Or would you recommend placement per operation (then should have common definition at least reused across commands) and other options?  plan for it
user_feedback_text: adjust specification with the need for a global option on how to deal with annex'ed content when is needed, e.g. `--annexed=error,get,skip-warning,skip`, so by default we would just error (but nicely and informatively), and then I could use  `bids-utils --annexed get session-rename ses-20230705 ses-202307XX` . Or would you recommend placement per operation (then should have common definition at least reused across commands) and other options?  plan for it

task: there should also be abstraction for 'ensure_writable' or alike which would unlock file if it is in annex locked (symlink to .git/annex/objects) mode.  Also at vcs level I guess we might want to orchestrate 'annex add' after modifications to bring it back into "original state".
user_feedback_text: there should also be abstraction for 'ensure_writable' or alike which would unlock file if it is in annex locked (symlink to .git/annex/objects) mode.  Also at vcs level I guess we might want to orchestrate 'annex add' after modifications to bring it back into "original state".

task:
We need to clarify in the specification and plan tasks to imrove --dry-run mode -- it should allow for detailed depiction of actions, not only "high level". E.g. now we get 

❯ bids-utils session-rename --dry-run ses-20230705 ses-202307XX
[DRY RUN] sub-qa: rename ses-20230705 → ses-202307XX
[DRY RUN] sub-qa64: rename ses-20230705 → ses-202307XX
Warning: sub-amit: session ses-20230705 not found, skipping
Warning: sub-emmet: session ses-20230705 not found, skipping
Warning: sub-sid000143: session ses-20230705 not found, skipping


whenever it actually entails many files renames and edits!  I think we could make it into `--dry-run=overview,detailed`, so if specified without value would  mean -- overview like now but allow for detailed where each action to be listed (file renamed, file edited, etc).  

Related -- there should be logging over dry actions on "need to get content"; and also when running about getting content!

Then also for session rename I noticed a bug:  as a result of rename some of the files remain having old sesison in its entity!

 bids-utils --annexed get session-rename ses-20230705 ses-202307XX
